text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the votes from her loyal<n>and dedicated
fans,<n>Matikanefukukitaru is able to race in<n>the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Wishing to return the favor however<n>she can, she
makes a declaration to<n>her kind supporters...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Rather than depending on luck, she<n>vows to rely
on her own strength<n>instead.
